Arbitration Functions

The Xbox Live arbitration functions include the following.

Function Description
XOnlineArbitrationCreateRoundID

Creates an arbitration round ID.
XOnlineArbitrationExtendRound

Resets the time length of an arbitrated round by a specified number of seconds.
XOnlineArbitrationRegister

Registers an item with the arbitration system.
XOnlineArbitrationRegisterGetResults

Retrieves the results of the task begun by XOnlineArbitrationRegister.
XOnlineArbitrationReport

Files an arbitration report. This updates players' reliability ratings.
